title: Inspect recent events and analysis outputs from the CLI

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
As an operator, I want Caducus CLI commands to show recent events and analysis outputs, so that I can verify what was collected and what the system currently thinks is important.

Feature: CLI inspection of events and analysis
  Scenario: List recent events
    Given Caducus has already collected canonical event records
    When I run a Caducus command to inspect recent events
    Then Caducus shows the most recent collected events with their timestamps, source, and group_id

  Scenario: Show recent analysis outputs
    Given Caducus has already run analysis for an event group
    When I run a Caducus command to inspect analysis outputs
    Then Caducus shows recent analysis results for that group
